title: GearsAndGizmos
description: The official modpack for my server "GearsAndGizmos", Be Welcome!
body:
The official modpack for my server "GearsAndGizmos" for my friends, If you found this modpack without knowing my (dutch) server, you can join if you want. go to my discord server https://discord.gg/QAYKjCRQYQ.
But only if you would like to join my server, i will tell about it.. 

Its based on the Create mod and Farmers Delight, there are some origins you can try out, and everyone that wants to make fun is totally welcome! My server has a Whitelist, so in discord send your minecraft username, and I will add you! me and my friends are all dutch, but we can all speak english, just not that good.

You can also use this modpack for yourself, it is really fun and gets updated every few days/weeks! So if you want to use this modpack, I'm totally OK with it!
Have fun, with the GearsAndGizmos Modpack!
